Appearances on WEDNESDAY-OCT-27-10:
C. Danny Wang, attorney for plaintiff Ludmila Leiderman, who is also present;
Anne C. Arnold, limited scope attorney, appearing for and with defendants Joani Hartley, Christine Stanger, and Jessie Morales

The settlement conference is held before Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue in Room 305B; Case is settled. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. The November 1, 2010 trial date is vacated.
